title: pilosella bauhini subsp. hispidissima
intro: Pilosella bauhini subsp. hispidissima, also known as rough hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella bauhini subsp. hispidissima include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pilosella bauhini subsp. hispidissima typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers.
